verdict_history.phase: Phase 6 dogfood C — initial Visual Oracle
verdict_history.notes: whileInView on body sections → sections invisible in fullPage screenshot. Visual Oracle correctly flagged '3500px black void' — the tool caught a real rendering bug caused by framer-motion + Playwright interaction. Visual raw score 65, REJECT. Dogfood finding #4.

After whileInView → animate fix across 5 files. Visual 76 reported, 73 computed (drift -3). Code Lane perfect 100 (0 err, 0 warn, 86 arbitrary-hex info). Mechanical 65/76 specs. Composite 86 passes MVP threshold (≥80). Remaining major critiques: five-phases 4-equal cards (AI feature grid feel), install CTA too small with dead space. Minor: hero meta column disconnection, pillars parallelism, fix-loop hierarchy. Acceptable for first shipment — opens refinement vectors for next iteration.

verdict.notes: First shipped entry to reach APPROVE_WARNING via full 3-lane composite on live render.
